criteria.stopping_rule: strict integer; an exposure is accepted only when its pre-exposure image meets the SNR criterion and its post-exposure state remains within the condensate-loss limit

range_rationale.detuning: 0.75-3.0 GHz retains the reference 1.5 GHz line, covers the detuning range used for the principal screening comparison, and avoids extending the figure into a high-detuning region that would require fluences beyond the displayed experimental range.
range_rationale.fluence: 10-180 mW us brackets the A, B and C conditions of Figure 5.1 and includes both image-quality-limited and depletion-limited operation.
range_rationale.quality: SNR_3x3 >= 9 is the stricter spatial-structure criterion motivated by the visible B-to-C improvement in Figure 5.1; it is a screening requirement for this task, not a universal visibility threshold.

scope.detector: provisional DCC3260M screening model with M=4, QE=0.60 and sigma_r=3 e- rms per pixel and readout
scope.disturbance: Version 1 heating plus initial-density reabsorption with 2 E_rec per scattering cycle
scope.faraday: absolute Faraday values use the uncalibrated illustrative setting kappa_F=1
